case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. ANITA MANOSCA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MANOSCA, ANITA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-27-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-15-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE (PROOF OF SERVICE) RETURNED NOT SERVED (TRANSACTION ID # 100033331) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100033624)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100034918), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED APR-25-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-26-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT MANOSCA, ANITA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-15-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
